chapter_title: Identifying Markings on Commercial Motor Vehicles
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 642. Identifying Markings on Commercial Motor Vehicles
##### § 642.003 — Nonapplicability

Section 642.002 (Identifying Markings on Certain Vehicles Required; Offense; Penalty) does not apply to a commercial motor vehicle, road-tractor, or truck-tractor that is:

    (1) registered under Section 502.433 (Fee: Commercial Farm Motor Vehicle) ;

    (2) required to be registered under Section 113.131 (Transport Trucks and Trailers) , Natural Resources Code;

    (3) operated in private carriage that is subject to Title 49, Code of Federal Regulations, Part 390.21;

    (4) operated under the direct control, supervision, or authority of a public utility, as recognized by the legislature, that is otherwise visibly marked; or

    (5) transporting timber products in their natural state from first point of production or harvest to first point of processing.

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 161 (S.B.1093), Sec. 20.030, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: Section 642.002 (Identifying Markings on Certain Vehicles Required; Offense; Penalty) does not apply to a commercial motor vehicle, road-tractor, or truck-tractor that is:
registered under Section 502.433 (Fee: Commercial Farm Motor Vehicle) ;
required to be registered under Section 113.131 (Transport Trucks and Trailers) , Natural Resources Code;
operated in private carriage that is subject to Title 49, Code of Federal Regulations, Part 390.21;
operated under the direct control, supervision, or authority of a public utility, as recognized by the legislature, that is otherwise visibly marked; or
transporting timber products in their natural state from first point of production or harvest to first point of processing.
